schema_purpose: This file lists trip-critical risks that the app must surface prominently (e.g. a red banner, not just buried in reference notes). Check this file for alerts matching the user's current or upcoming waypoint, and display any 'critical' severity alert unmissably -- on the map, in the day's itinerary view, and ideally as a push/local notification a day before the affected waypoint if the app supports scheduling against dates.

alerts.title: Confirmed gap: Kebnats -> Vakkotavare bus, 13 Sep 2026
alerts.short_summary: No bus Kebnats -> Vakkotavare on 13 Sep 2026. Confirmed from operator's full timetable.
alerts.trip_context: South-to-north start 1 Sep -> Kebnats arrival est. 6-10 Sep. Avoid 13 Sep for this leg.
alerts.details: Confirmed directly from the operator's full timetable (both trips, both directions), not inferred. Tur 1 resumes 14 Sep; Tur 2 already stopped (this direction) after 12 Sep -- no overlap on the 13th. General note: 2026 Gällivare train-maintenance disruption may still affect other dates.
alerts.why_it_matters: No shop at Vakkotavare, no easy alt transport. Missed bus = stranded overnight at Kebnats.
action_required: Re-estimate Kebnats arrival date as the hike progresses; flag if it lands on 13 Sep.
If 13 Sep or uncertain: rest day to shift arrival to <= 12 Sep (Tur 2, 16:50), or push to 14 Sep (Tur 1, 10:55).
Call Road to Ritsem (+46 970 248 00) once date is firm, especially near 13 Sep.
Backup: STF contacts Christer Dynesius +46 70 241 66 35, Tobbe Öberg +46 70 340 42 72.
